block.title: LookingGlass Cyber CTC Configuration
block.text:
To request an API token you will need to login to https://developers.lookingglasscyber.com with a valid CTC user account in order to generate the request. Once you login to the site, click on the Request API token button in the Getting Started section.

If you are not currently a customer of LookingGlass, please contact our Sales team via phone at (888) 726-8893 or via email at support@lookingglasscyber.com to obtain demo credentials.

input.label: Number of hours to pull back data from CTC (Default is 1)

block.title: LookingGlass Cyber CTC Configuration Options
block.text: Retrieve CTC Data for the following items:

input.label: Enter the proxy server address (e.g. mycompany.proxy.com:8080, not http://mycompany.proxy.com:8080)
